info.english_meaning: to cut to pluck to destroy to dissolve
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: lvAdiprayojanaM tu nizWAntasya natvaM - ' lvAdayaH ' (8.2.44) iti sUtreRa  ataH tiNantarUpezu tasya prayojanaM na dfSyate  lUYAdayaH ekaviMSatiH pvAdayaH
